title: Numbers & Math
description: There's only one number type — and its quirks.

questions.prompt: Which produces the integer part of 7 / 2?
questions.explanation: JavaScript has no // operator. Use Math.floor or Math.trunc.
NaN is a numeric value — typeof NaN === 'number'. To test, use Number.isNaN(x).

questions.prompt: Which converts the string '42' to the number 42?
questions.explanation: All work; Number() and parseInt(x, 10) are the most explicit and safe.
